race_meta.race_name: Fairlight Studios Conditional Jockeys' Handicap Hurdle

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner cosmic soul (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Captain Cool with 32.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Captain Cool > Cosmic Soul, but actual result was Cosmic Soul (IRE) > Captain Cool (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
